title: Code page "Architecture Diagram" widget shows "Syntax error in text — mermaid version 11.14.0" when the diagram-architecture doc is the iw-doc-generator Markdown-with-fences form

steps.description: code_ui.py: make the diagram-architecture rendering format-aware — Markdown-with-fences doc → rendered HTML (all diagrams, via _preprocess_mermaid/render_markdown, leading H1 dropped, ELK config front-matter stripped per fenced block); bare-DSL mapgen format → unchanged single <div class="mermaid"> path. Pass the new context var(s) from both code_page and code_architecture.
Code review of S01 (backend-impl) — code_ui.py format-aware diagram rendering

code_architecture_diagram.html: render arch_diagram_html when set (inside .code-diagram-container, no .mermaid div), keep the arch_diagram_dsl <div class="mermaid"> path, keep the arch_purpose line and the iwRenderMermaid script. code_architecture_view.html: widen the bottom include guard to cover the rendered-HTML case.
Code review of S03 (frontend-impl) — code_architecture_diagram.html / code_architecture_view.html

New tests/dashboard/test_i00081_code_page_arch_diagram.py — reproduction (Markdown-format diagram-architecture doc → page renders the embedded diagrams cleanly, no syntax error, no Markdown chrome or layout:elk leaking into a Mermaid container) + regression (bare-DSL format still renders one <div class="mermaid">; leading H1 not duplicated; the /api/code/architecture fragment route handled too).
Code review of S05 (tests-impl) — test coverage and semantic correctness
Global cross-agent review of all I-00081 work
QV: Linting (ruff + dashboard JS + Jinja2 template checks)

QV: Browser verification — the Code page "Architecture Diagram" widget renders the diagram(s), no "Syntax error in text" box, no "No diagram type detected" red text, no new console errors; adjacent Code-page flows still work
